text:
Created attachment 144838
luafilesystem-1.6.2-2.diff

Hi. Here's a patch to update devel/luafilesystem to 1.6.2 using
the v1_6_2 tag. Can we please get this moving? Update of
editors/wordgrinder depends on this update.

Redports logs for this patch are at [1].

[1] https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140721114400-23551/
